title: Direction-Agnostic Signals
summary: All 9 signal dimensions now score conviction (setup quality, 0-10) separately from direction (long/short, +1/−1). A weighted majority vote across all dimensions determines final trade direction. A clean bearish breakdown scores identically to the equivalent bullish setup. Shipped in Phase A commit (620e75d).
approach: Refactored score_universe() in signals.py. Each dimension appends (direction, weight) to dim_directions list. Weighted sum determines direction: positive = long, negative = short. Total score = sum of conviction scores. TREND, MOMENTUM, SQUEEZE, FLOW, BREAKOUT, CONFLUENCE, NEWS, SOCIAL, REVERSION all symmetric.
